---
id: receive-nomba-webhook
title: "Internal endpoint Nomba calls into. Not used by Kobo integrators."
description: "Documented for completeness and for engineers implementing the reconciliation engine. Verifies the Nomba signature header before processing. Every event includes a transaction reference used as the idempotency key; duplicate deliveries are accepted (200) but produce no additional ledger writes."
sidebar_label: "Internal endpoint Nomba calls into. Not used by Kobo integrators."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/kobo-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Internal endpoint Nomba calls into. Not used by Kobo integrators."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/webhooks/nomba"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Documented for completeness and for engineers implementing the reconciliation engine. Verifies the Nomba signature header before processing. Every event includes a transaction reference used as the idempotency key; duplicate deliveries are accepted (200) but produce no additional ledger writes.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>

>
  
</StatusCodes>
